title: Queen Anne - Visit Seattle
content: # Queen Anne. The Space Needle in Seattle is seen through vertical metal beams at sunset from the Queen Anne neighborhood, with a colorful sky and clouds in the background. Uptown buzzes with energy, anchored by **Seattle Center**—a one-stop for must-see attractions like the iconic **Space Needle** and the kid-approved **Pacific Science Center**, with its tropical butterfly house. Catch home games of the NHL’s Seattle Kraken and PWHL’s brand-new team at **Climate Pledge Arena**. Steps from Climate Pledge Arena, **Tom’s Watch Bar** is a lively spot to catch the game on a giant screen, and nearby **Queen Anne Beer Hall** doles out craft brews and satisfying pub fare at communal tables. Atop Queen Anne Hill, inviting neighborhood eateries include upscale Mediterranean bistro **Grappa**, **Isarn Thai Soul Kitchen**, and enchanting French pastry shop **Moonrise Bakery**. **Blue Highway Games** is a welcoming place to discover new tabletop games, trading cards, and puzzles, while music aficionados will want to explore the stacks of vinyl, CDs, and cassettes at **Royal Records**.
